value.found_quote: The Sora web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026. The Sora API will be discontinued on September 24, 2026.
value.rationale: The page confirms that OpenAI did offer Sora, but it has been shut down. The web and app experiences were discontinued on April 26, 2026, and the API is set to be discontinued on September 24, 2026. The offering exists/existed, but its lifecycle status is 'sunset' — it has been discontinued, not merely deprecated. The claim that OpenAI "offers" Sora is only partially substantiated: the product existed, but is no longer actively offered.
